focalElement: carved stone archway with Embertide-of-Courage motif at apex
secondaryElement: twin fluted pillars entwined with emerald ivy, two UNLIT iron torch sconces at base
notes: Shared across every Wild Encounter altar — not boss-specific.
Raster is a cutout overlay with transparent interior; the stained-glass CSS pane shows through.
Torches are UNLIT in the raster — the ember pulse on the pane is pure CSS (BossAltarPane animations).
Embertide-of-Courage chosen for the Wild variant to signal the Kid/wild-boss tier (courage ~ the first trial).

Alpha channel cleaned in resolution-bpa via `scripts/gen-altar-frames-v2.py --mode=cleanup`, which strips the bright-pure-grayscale opaque residue (checker-pattern transparency-indicator pixels that leaked through u-10c's BFS flood-fill). The cleanup preserves legitimate ornament (saturated colors and dark stone/shadow) and targets only the checker signature (R≈G≈B, value≥175, fully opaque).
